message.content:
@startuml
actor Admin
participant ":RemoveScooterUI" as UI
participant ":RemoveScooterScooterController" as Controller
participant "pharmServ\n:PharmacyService" as PharmServ
participant "pharmDB\n:PharmacyDB" as PharmDB
participant "scootServ\n:ScooterService" as ScootServ
participant "scootDB\n:ScooterDB" as ScootDB

Admin -> UI: 1 Sends a request regarding the update of an electric scooter's data
activate UI
UI -> Controller: 2 showPharmacies()
activate Controller
Controller -> PharmServ: 3 create()
activate PharmServ
PharmServ -> PharmDB: 4 create()
activate PharmDB
PharmDB --> PharmServ: 
deactivate PharmDB
PharmServ --> Controller: 5 lstPharmacies = getPharmacies()
deactivate PharmServ
Controller -> PharmDB: 6 lstPharmacies = getPharmacies()
activate PharmDB
PharmDB --> Controller: 
deactivate PharmDB
ref over PharmDB
  SD_CONNECTIONS
end ref
Controller --> UI: 
deactivate Controller
UI --> Admin: 7 Shows the list of pharmacies and asks to choose one
Admin -> UI: 8 Chooses the pharmacy
UI -> Controller: 9 showScooterList(pharmacyId)
activate Controller
Controller -> ScootServ: 10 create()
activate ScootServ
ScootServ -> ScootDB: 11 create()
activate ScootDB
ScootDB --> ScootServ: 
deactivate ScootDB
ScootServ --> Controller: 12 lstScooters = getScootersList(pharmacyId)
deactivate ScootServ
Controller -> ScootDB: 13 lstScooters = getScootersList(pharmacyId)
activate ScootDB
ScootDB --> Controller: 
deactivate ScootDB
ref over ScootDB
  SD_CONNECTIONS
end ref
Controller --> UI: 
deactivate Controller
UI --> Admin: 14 Shows the list of eletrc scooters and asks to choose one
Admin -> UI: 15 Chooses the eletrc scooter
UI --> Admin: 16 Shows the information about the scooter, asking to update
Admin -> UI: 17 Updates the information
UI -> Controller: 18 updateScooter(batteryPerc, chargingStatus,\n potency, weight, batteryCapacity, maxPayload, pharmacyId)
activate Controller
Controller -> ScootServ: 19 updateScooter(batteryPerc, chargingStatus,\n potency, weight, batteryCapacity, maxPayload, pharmacyId)
activate ScootServ
ScootServ -> ScootDB: 20 updateScooterFromDB(batteryPerc, chargingStatus,\n potency, weight, batteryCapacity, maxPayload, pharmacyId)
activate ScootDB
ScootDB --> ScootServ: 
deactivate ScootDB
ScootServ --> Controller: 
deactivate ScootServ
Controller --> UI: 
deactivate Controller
ref over ScootDB
  SD_Connections
end ref
UI --> Admin: 21 Validates all the information, informing of the success of the operation
deactivate UI
@enduml
